name: @perks/meta-skill-cli
description: Meta Skill TypeScript CLI for portable skill workbenches.

scripts.check:app: tmp=$(mktemp -d) && trap 'rm -rf "$tmp"' EXIT && tsc -p tsconfig.json --outDir "$tmp" && diff -qr "$tmp" app
scripts.test: npm run build:test && node --test "app/**/*.test.js" && npm run build && npm run check:app
